div1.entryFree:
Bruit, vb., to announce with noise: by this great clatter one of greatest note seems --ed, Mcb. V, 7, 22. the king's rouse the heavens shall b. again, Hml. I, 2, 127.
Hence == to report, to noise abroad: his death being --ed once, H4B I, 1, 114. thou art no less than fame hath --ed, H6A II, 3, 68.
